    1. hasAccess(FeatureID)

Class SupporterValidator<FeatureID extends Enum<?>>

java.lang.Object
dev.chojo.aether.supporter.service.context.SupporterValidator<FeatureID>
Type Parameters:
FeatureID - The enum type representing the features.
public class SupporterValidator<FeatureID extends Enum<?>> extends Object
A validator for checking access to features. This class is typically injected into the command's key-value store.

      public AccessCheckResult hasAccess(FeatureID feature)
      Checks if the given feature is accessible.

      Returns:
      The result of the access check.
